news.title:
Nadir Godrej to retire as chairperson of Godrej Industries Group.
Pirojsha Godrej named successor, signaling a planned generational transition.
news.summary:
Nadir Godrej to retire as chairperson of Godrej Industries Group.
Pirojsha Godrej named successor, signaling a planned generational transition.

news.title: Godrej Properties shares rose 2% after its Q4 business update.
news.summary: Godrej Properties shares rose 2% after its Q4 business update.

news.title:
Godrej Properties adds ₹42,100 Cr future sales target, exceeding FY2026 guidance.
Reports 59% YoY growth, delivering 12.1 mn sq ft projects at 121% of guidance.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties adds ₹42,100 Cr future sales target, exceeding FY2026 guidance.
Reports 59% YoY growth, delivering 12.1 mn sq ft projects at 121% of guidance.

news.title:
Godrej Properties' booking value up 16% to ₹34,171 cr in FY26, India's highest.
Collections rose 17% to ₹19,965 cr; operating cash flow grew 5% to ₹7,830 cr.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties' booking value up 16% to ₹34,171 cr in FY26, India's highest.
Collections rose 17% to ₹19,965 cr; operating cash flow grew 5% to ₹7,830 cr.

news.title:
Godrej Properties announces participation in Analyst/Investor Meet on April 16, 2026, in Hong Kong.
Latest quarterly investor presentation available on their website will be showcased at the event.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties announces participation in Analyst/Investor Meet on April 16, 2026, in Hong Kong.
Latest quarterly investor presentation available on their website will be showcased at the event.

news.title:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.
news.summary:
Jefferies cuts target prices for DLF, Lodha, Oberoi, citing Middle East conflict's impact on sector growth.
DLF, Lodha, Godrej retain 'Buy' ratings; Prestige, Oberoi see cautious outlook due to pre-sales decline.

news.title:
HDFC Securities revises target prices for real estate developers, citing slower velocity and deal closure delays.
Top picks include Prestige Estates, Godrej Properties (upgraded to Buy), Oberoi Realty, and Sobha.
news.summary:
HDFC Securities revises target prices for real estate developers, citing slower velocity and deal closure delays.
Top picks include Prestige Estates, Godrej Properties (upgraded to Buy), Oberoi Realty, and Sobha.

news.title:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.
news.summary:
Top realty players may report mixed pre-sales in Q4 FY26 due to launch delays.
Softer demand sentiment amid macro uncertainty from West Asia war impacts performance.

news.title:
Nifty Realty index fell 24% in 2026 amid housing demand fears, IT sector uncertainty, and geopolitical risks.
Developers like Godrej Properties and Macrotech saw strong launches, but FY27 growth may slow with demand-supply challenges.
news.summary:
Nifty Realty index fell 24% in 2026 amid housing demand fears, IT sector uncertainty, and geopolitical risks.
Developers like Godrej Properties and Macrotech saw strong launches, but FY27 growth may slow with demand-supply challenges.

news.title:
Godrej Properties and Lodha Developers acquired 25+ land parcels in FY26, eyeing ₹1 lakh cr revenue.
Godrej targets ₹32.5k cr in sales bookings; Lodha aims for ₹21k cr, driven by strong housing demand.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties and Lodha Developers acquired 25+ land parcels in FY26, eyeing ₹1 lakh cr revenue.
Godrej targets ₹32.5k cr in sales bookings; Lodha aims for ₹21k cr, driven by strong housing demand.

news.title:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.
news.summary:
Real estate stocks like Godrej Properties, DLF, and Sobha fall 3-4% amid US-Iran war impact.
Sector faces tile supply issues due to gas shortages; Realty index down 10% in March, led by Lodha's 16% drop.

news.title:
Godrej Properties acquires 20-acre land near Whitefield, Bengaluru.
The project has an estimated revenue potential of ₹1,350 crore.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties acquires 20-acre land near Whitefield, Bengaluru.
The project has an estimated revenue potential of ₹1,350 crore.

news.title:
Godrej Properties acquires 44-acre land in Coimbatore for premium residential project.
Development spans 1.1 mn sq ft with potential revenue of INR 450 cr.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties acquires 44-acre land in Coimbatore for premium residential project.
Development spans 1.1 mn sq ft with potential revenue of INR 450 cr.

news.title:
Jefferies retains Buy on Godrej Properties, setting a target price of Rs 2,700.
Promoters' 3.5% stake buy signals confidence; ~20% RoE on track by FY27.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains Buy on Godrej Properties, setting a target price of Rs 2,700.
Promoters' 3.5% stake buy signals confidence; ~20% RoE on track by FY27.

news.title:
Godrej Properties acquired 11.36 acres in Gurugram's Sector 63A for residential development.
Project's revenue potential exceeds INR 4,500 crore, boosting FY26 sales beyond INR 40,000 crore.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties acquired 11.36 acres in Gurugram's Sector 63A for residential development.
Project's revenue potential exceeds INR 4,500 crore, boosting FY26 sales beyond INR 40,000 crore.

news.title:
Godrej Properties won bid for 5-acre land near EM Bypass, Kolkata.
Project estimated to generate INR 1,650 crore revenue potential.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties won bid for 5-acre land near EM Bypass, Kolkata.
Project estimated to generate INR 1,650 crore revenue potential.

news.title:
Top 5 listed realtors' sales bookings rose 20% to ₹84,000 cr in Apr-Dec FY26.
Combined sales bookings of 28 listed realtors reached ₹1,32,569 cr, driven by luxury demand.
news.summary:
Top 5 listed realtors' sales bookings rose 20% to ₹84,000 cr in Apr-Dec FY26.
Combined sales bookings of 28 listed realtors reached ₹1,32,569 cr, driven by luxury demand.

news.title:
Godrej Properties sells luxury apartment on Carmichael Road, Mumbai for ₹69 crore at ₹1.58 lakh/sq ft.
Property registration documents accessed by Zapkey confirm the sale details.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties sells luxury apartment on Carmichael Road, Mumbai for ₹69 crore at ₹1.58 lakh/sq ft.
Property registration documents accessed by Zapkey confirm the sale details.

news.title:
Godrej Properties plans to develop an 18-acre project in Thane, Mumbai, with a revenue potential of over INR 7,500 crore.
The project is in a well-connected area and aims to enhance living experience with planned residential development.
news.summary:
Godrej Properties plans to develop an 18-acre project in Thane, Mumbai, with a revenue potential of over INR 7,500 crore.
The project is in a well-connected area and aims to enhance living experience with planned residential development.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
